name: Tianjin Guifaxiang 18th Street Mahua Food Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Guifaxiang 18th Street Mahua Food Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sales of snack foods. It offers pastries, seasonal foods, breads, sweet chestnuts, and nuts. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in Tianjin, China.
